testcase.name: Authentication Flow › should display login form
Authentication Flow › should show validation errors for empty fields
Authentication Flow › should successfully login and redirect to dashboard
Authentication Flow › should login with admin credentials and redirect to dashboard
Authentication Flow › should show error message on failed login
Authentication Flow › should toggle remember me checkbox
Authentication Flow › should select country from dropdown
Authentication Flow › should login with different country options
Authentication Flow › should have forgot password link
Groups Page › should display groups page UI elements
Groups Page › should switch to users tab
Groups Page › should load and display groups data
Groups Page › should switch between groups and users tabs
Groups Page › should open create group dialog
Groups Page › should create new group
Groups Page › should edit existing group
Groups Page › should delete group with confirmation
Groups Page › should display users list in users tab
Groups Page › should open create user dialog
Groups Page › should search users
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should display SLA Configuration tab and items
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should edit SLA configuration and update list
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should cancel SLA edit without saving
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should switch between tabs on settings page
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should load and display problem types data
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should add new problem type
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should edit problem type
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should delete problem type
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should load and display site levels data
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should add new site level
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should edit site level
Settings Page - SLA Configuration › should delete site level
Sites Management › should display sites page
Sites Management › should display sites list
Sites Management › should open add site dialog
Sites Management › should search sites
Sites Management › should display site statistics
Ticket Management › should display ticket list
Ticket Management › should display statistics cards
Ticket Management › should filter tickets by type
Ticket Management › should filter tickets by status
Ticket Management › should search tickets
Ticket Management › should click create ticket button
Ticket Management › should click view button on ticket
Ticket Management › should display ticket tabs
Ticket Management › should show empty state when no tickets found
Ticket Management › should clear filters
Ticket Management › should navigate between ticket type tabs
Ticket Management › should navigate to create ticket
Ticket Management › should view ticket details
Ticket Management › should accept open ticket
testcase.system-out: Note: Accept button not found - this may be expected in test environment

testcase.name: Ticket Management › should show ticket action buttons
Ticket Management › should display ticket information correctly
Ticket Management › should navigate to tickets page
